description: Default capability for Rekindle windows. Permissions enforce minimum-privilege: each window pattern can only invoke the listed Tauri commands. The `core:window:*` block uses explicit per-action grants instead of `core:window:default` so removing or adding a window operation is auditable in this file. Plugin-level `*:default` bundles are still used pending a per-IPC-call audit; see docs/security/threat-model.md §5b W4 for the open work.
